dataList.name: Enough Games
dataList.desc: Turn Start: Gain [AttackUp] equal to current turn count

dataList.name: That's Goin' in the Book
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: Inflict 1 [RicardoBookRaid] on all enemies

When hit, inflict 2 [RicardoBookRaid] on the attacker
On Hit, reduce [RicardoBookRaid] on target by 1

Gain [RicardoTattooRaid] equal to the cumulative Stack of [RicardoBookRaid] reduced by this unit in this Encounter

dataList.name: Too Grave a Sin
dataList.desc: On Use of a Skill, if target has 20+ [RicardoBookRaid], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin]s If Ricardo's Skill targets a unit that has max [RicardoBookRaid] Stack, the said Skill gains the 'Cannot change target' attribute

dataList.name: Don't Resist and Accept Your Punishments
dataList.desc: Combat Start: If target has equipped Defense Skills, deal -30% damage against those targets

dataList.name: Familial Love
dataList.desc: At 60%- HP, enter a new phase - Remove all effects other than those exclusive to this unit

dataList.name: That Heishou's Left Me a Smarting Ache
dataList.desc:
Phase 2 exclusive Passive
At the start of Phase 2, inflict [BurstAgility] and [BurstZilu] on Ricardo
Ricardo takes +50% Gluttony damage

dataList.name: You're The Middle's Priority Revenge Target
dataList.desc: Turn Start: If there is a unit that has 30 [RicardoBookRaid], gain an additional Skill Slot and use "IMMEDIATE, COMPLETE, AND TOTAL EXTERMINATION!" Skill with it

dataList.name: The Big Brother
dataList.desc: Starting from turn 2, all allies, including this unit, heal 10 SP at Turn Start Take -20% damage from [Combustion], [Laceration], [Vibration], [Burst], and [Sinking]

dataList.name: Brush it Off
dataList.desc: Gain the Fixed Panic attribute Turn End: If this unit is in Panic, reset SP to 0 At 50%- HP, enter a new phase - Remove all effects other than those exclusive to this unit

dataList.name: Brush it Off
dataList.desc:
Gain the Fixed Panic attribute
Turn End: If this unit is in Panic, reset SP to 0
